title: The Year of Your Lower Back
subtitle: Companion Workbook — map your low back's patterns and track your progress
author: Nate Ratcliff, LMT
license: For Healing Hands By Nate Inner Circle members. Personal use only. Please don't redistribute — share the membership instead.
description: A year-long companion to the IC1 deep cut. Use the pattern self-assessment when something flares, the 30-day tracker when you start a new practice, the seasonal check-ins at the start of each season.
